title: Reis haircut
wikitext:
[]: Rei's haircut.             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Sun Sep 11, 2011 2:16 pm What's it called? I seem to remember there being a real-life haircut quite similar to Rei's hair, and there's a term for it. (Though, maybe I just imagined it.) What is it?

[]:             Quote Post by Sephizim » Sun Sep 11, 2011 2:28 pm All I can think of is in the Commentary of Evil they refer to it as a... "baby Thurman" or something to that effect? I think they're making some kind of joke there, but its so either obscure or esoteric that I've never gotten what they were talking about in the whole section about Rei's hairstyle. I have no idea if that's the name of an actual hairstyle, but that's the best I can offer. (Watch as they were making an obvious/lame joke that everyone else gets but me...)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 11, 2011 2:45 pm Short?

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sun Sep 11, 2011 2:48 pm Short bob cut.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun Sep 11, 2011 3:35 pm They usually call it either a Pageboy cut or a Bob cut.

[]:             Quote Post by Born of Lilith » Sun Sep 11, 2011 4:02 pm Emo.

[]:             Quote Post by Knuckles » Sun Sep 11, 2011 9:38 pm teh Rei

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Sep 11, 2011 10:01 pm TehDonutKing wrote: Short bob cut.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Mon Sep 12, 2011 2:03 pm It's a pageboy, a Bob is much tidier and shorter in length.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Sep 12, 2011 8:28 pm More on it here .
